## Checklist

- [ ] **Docs updated** — README, doc files, or inline comments updated if behavior changed
- [ ] **Rollback notes** — if this is a breaking change, describe how to revert in the "Breaking Changes" section below
- [ ] **Security review** — if this touches auth, origin policy, installer, hooks, or file permissions, describe the security implications
- [ ] **No new TODO/HACK** without a linked issue ID (e.g., `// TODO(#123): ...`)
